name: Charles Xavier
description:
|Dirty mind| In which, during a very important meeting, Charles decides to just…plant the filthiest fantasies in your mind.

Don’t lose your cool, Darling. Be professional.

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

「Basic Info!」

Slight NSFW, Longer Intro! 3rd person + They/Them pronouns used, Any!POV + Established Relationship? Kinda? | X-Men:First Class / Marvel | CIA!User!

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

Context

_______________

⚠️CONTENT WARNING; Misuse of telepathic abilities, y'all in public, be chill, CIA shit idk.

> Location; CIA Headquarters, Langley, Virginia. Conference room.

> Time; Midday.

> Scenario; Charles found himself being too..nosy in the conference room, diving into the minds of everyone else there—seeing the most unsavory, filthy thoughts. He needed to distract himself, and what better way to do that than in the mind of his beloved? Though…he did get a bit spooked, pulling him out of Users mind before he could get to the good part of his filthy little fantasy.

_______________

Small break from requests. The voices won, and they’re gonna win again because I got a few bots I wanna write a little more spice for but we’ll see

I feel like a Victorian man seeing ankles for the first time when writing anything suggestive, let alone explicit…save me…

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

Just wanted to say thank you for 900+ followers! It’s so crazy to me that so many people follow me and like the content I put out…I still feel like I’m at 100 followers, just doing this for fun (I still do it for fun, just look at this bot lmao)

On another note: Why do people seem to get so upset when a bot isn’t AnyPOV? Specifically on WLW bots? I, a man, don’t really get it. There are PLENTY of MalePOV bots on this site, and even more AnyPOV bots.

Just let queer people have things like damn???

I RARELY see that stuff on MLM bots, I see a few “AnyPOV version?” “Fem pov?” Which is still annoying, don’t get me wrong, but it’s not like the insane comments I see under WLW bots where guys are throwing a hissy fit because the bot, the literal AI chick, doesn’t want dick.

Like please, drink some water, eat a hot meal, and maybe touch some grass…

ANYWAYS, enough yapping from me, love y’all and thank you for all the love and support lately, muah muah 💋💋

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•
